source: from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, types as T

# -------------------------------
# 3. Flatten main funders metadata
# -------------------------------

funders_csv = (
    funders_df.select(
        F.regexp_replace(F.col("id"), "https://openalex.org/", "").alias("funders_id"),
        F.regexp_replace(F.col("ids.openalex"), "https://openalex.org/", "").alias("openalex_id"),
        F.regexp_replace(F.col("ids.ror"), "https://ror.org/", "").alias("ror_id"),
        F.col("ids.crossref").alias("crossref_id"),
        F.to_json(F.col("ids")).alias("other_ids_json"),

        F.to_json(F.col("roles")).alias("roles"),

        F.col("country_code"),
        F.col("grants_count"),

        F.trim(F.col("display_name")).alias("display_name"),
        F.trim(F.col("display_name")).alias("name_as_stated"),
        F.trim(F.concat_ws("~~~~", F.col("alternate_titles"))).alias("alternate_titles"),

        F.col("works_count"),
        F.col("cited_by_count"),
        F.col("summary_stats.2yr_mean_citedness").alias("if2y"),
        F.col("summary_stats.h_index").alias("h_index"),
        F.col("summary_stats.i10_index").alias("i10_index"),
        F.to_json(F.col("counts_by_year")).alias("counts_by_year"),

        F.col("updated_date"),
        F.col("created_date")
    )

# -------------------------------
# 4. Explode counts_by_year for child table
# -------------------------------

funders_counts = (
    funders_df
    .withColumn("funders_id", F.regexp_replace(F.col("id"), "https://openalex.org/", ""))
    .withColumn("counts", F.explode_outer("counts_by_year"))
    .select(
        "funders_id",
        F.col("counts.year").cast(T.IntegerType()).alias("year"),
        F.col("counts.works_count").cast(T.IntegerType()).alias("works_count"),
        F.col("counts.cited_by_count").cast(T.IntegerType()).alias("cited_by_count"),
        F.col("counts.oa_works_count").cast(T.IntegerType()).alias("oa_works_count")
    )
    .filter(F.col("counts").isNotNull())

(funders_csv
 .coalesce(1)
 .write
 .mode("overwrite")
 .option("header", "true")
 .csv(OUTPUT_FINAL_PATH_1))

(funders_counts
 .coalesce(1)
 .write
 .mode("overwrite")
 .option("header", "true")
 .csv(OUTPUT_FINAL_PATH_2))

print("✅ funders_csv and funders_counts successfully written to Gen2.")
